title: Bluebeard's Seven Wives
writer: Randolph Bartlett, Blanche Merrill, Paul Schofield
actors: Ben Lyon, Lois Wilson, Blanche Sweet
plot: Bank clerk John Hart is about to marry Mary Kelly, but she insists that before that happens he must grow a mustache. The idea of that shakes him up so much that he gets distracted at work, comes up short in his accounts and gets f...
